statement.markdown:
## Problem Statement
Create an accessible combobox component that meets the latest web accessibility guidelines.

### Requirements
1. The combobox should have a visually hidden label for screen readers.

starterCode.css: /* Tailwind CSS classes */@tailwind base;@tailwind components;@tailwind utilities;
starterCode.javascript: // JavaScript code to be completedvar combobox = document.getElementById('combobox');

gradingCriteria.description: The combobox has a visually hidden label for screen readers.
The combobox can be navigated using the keyboard.
The combobox has a clear visual hierarchy.
The combobox uses ARIA attributes correctly.
